headline: Is Brown & Brown, Inc. (BRO) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is BRO a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Brown & Brown, Inc. on Grillo Insights’s Substack by Eric García. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on BRO. Brown & Brown, Inc.’s share was trading at $59.95 as of June 11th. BRO’s trailing and forward P/E were 19.60 and […]
